source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The three identical loudspeakers play a 170 Hz tone in a room where the speed of sound is 340 m/s. You are standing 4.0 m in front of the middle speaker. At this point, the amplitude of the wave from each speaker is \text{a}. When the amplitude is maximum, by what factor is the sound intensity greater than the sound intensity from a single speaker?
